theme: Tuscany — Farm to table, team to family

linkedin.text:
The best team building doesn't feel like team building. It feels like a flour-covered CFO arguing carbonara technique with a junior analyst — as equals.

That happened in a 400-year-old Tuscan villa, where we put 30 executives in front of a local nonna and a wall of fresh pasta.

No PowerPoints. No facilitators. No awkward name tags. Just real food, real stories, and the kind of connection a meeting room can't manufacture.

After 200+ events in 120+ countries since 2010, this is the pattern: hierarchy dissolves the moment people create something together.

Farm to table. Team to family.

📅 DM us to design a culinary program for your team.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #Tuscany

instagram.text:
The CEO lost the sauce-making contest. The team never let it go. 🍝

30 executives. A 400-year-old Tuscan villa. One unforgettable day:

👩‍🍳 Making fresh pasta with a local nonna
🫒 An olive-oil tasting that ran 2 hours
🍷 Competitive sauce-making (yes, the CEO came last)

No PowerPoints. No name tags. Just real food, real stories, real connection.

Farm to table. Team to family. 💛

Save this and tag the HR lead planning the next offsite.

📩 Link in bio.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #LuxuryTravel #EventPlanning #WorkPerks #CompanyCulture #Tuscany #MICE

facebook.text:
By the end of the day, the CFO and the junior analyst were debating carbonara techniques — as equals. 🍝

That's what a Tuscan villa does. We put 30 executives, a local nonna, and a wall of fresh pasta in one room. Flour-covered suits. Competitive sauce-making. An olive-oil tasting that turned into a 2-hour conversation about life.

No PowerPoints. No name tags. Just real connection.

Farm to table. Team to family.

Would your team cook together, or would chaos reign? Tell us in the comments. 💬

#Tuscany #Italy #CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #MICE
